mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.view_count, p.wish_count, s.seller_name FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no WHERE p.sale_stop = 0 AND p.menu_sub_id = #{menuSubId}
AND (p.created_at, p.product_id) < (#{lastCreatedAt}, #{lastProductId})
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.product_id DESC
AND ( (p.view_count + p.wish_count) < #{lastPopularity} OR ( (p.view_count + p.wish_count) = #{lastPopularity} AND (p.created_at, p.product_id) < (#{lastCreatedAt}, #{lastProductId}) ) )
ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.wish_count) DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.product_id DESC
ORDER BY p.product_id DESC
LIMIT 30

SELECT product_option_id FROM nextjs_shop_cart WHERE product_option_id IN ( SELECT product_option_id FROM nextjs_shop_product_option WHERE product_id = #{productId} ) AND user_no = #{userNo} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT c.product_option_id AS productOptionId, c.quantity AS quantity FROM nextjs_shop_cart c WHERE c.user_no = #{userNo} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.product_option_id IN
#{item.productOptionId}

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.like_count, p.view_count, p.wish_count, s.seller_name, s.seller_name_en, s.business_registration_number, s.telecom_sales_number, s.representative_name, s.business_zipcode, s.business_address, s.business_address_detail, s.like_count AS sellerLikeCount, s.base_shipping_fee, s.free_shipping_min_amount, s.extra_shipping_fee, p.menu_sub_id, ms.menu_name AS subMenuName, mt.menu_name AS topMenuName, mt.gender, p.material_info, p.manufacturer_name, p.country_of_origin, p.wash_care_info, p.manufactured_ym, p.quality_guarantee_info, p.after_service_contact, p.after_service_manager, p.after_service_phone, p.shipping_type, p.shipping_due_date, p.shipping_note FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_sub ms ON ms.menu_sub_id = p.menu_sub_id JOIN nextjs_shop_menu_top mt ON mt.menu_top_id = ms.menu_top_id WHERE sale_stop = 0 AND product_id = #{productId}

SELECT pi.product_id, f.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON pi.file_id = f.file_id WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND pi.is_thumbnail = 1 ORDER BY pi.product_id ASC, pi.sort_key ASC

SELECT product_option_id, product_id, add_price, (stock - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(sh.count) FROM nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh WHERE sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id AND sh.status = 'HOLD' AND sh.active_hold = 1 AND sh.expires_at > NOW() ), 0)) AS stock, size FROM nextjs_shop_product_option po WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_displayed = 1

SELECT c.coupon_id, c.description, c.discount_type, c.discount_value, c.max_discount, c.minimum_order_before_amount, c.status, c.is_stackable, c.is_product_restricted, c.amount, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.issue_method,
ca.coupon_allowed_id, uc.user_coupon_id, s.seller_name FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_coupon c ON (c.seller_no = p.seller_no OR (c.seller_no IS NULL AND c.admin_no IS NOT NULL)) LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_coupon_allowed ca ON ca.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND ca.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_user_coupon uc ON uc.coupon_id = c.coupon_id AND uc.user_no = #{userNo} LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON c.seller_no = s.seller_no WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND c.status = 'ACTIVE' AND c.amount > 0
AND ( c.is_product_restricted = 0 OR ca.product_id IS NOT NULL ) AND ( c.issue_method = 'CLAIM' OR (c.issue_method IN ('MANUAL','AUTO') AND uc.user_coupon_id IS NOT NULL) ) AND ( uc.user_coupon_id IS NULL -- 아직 안받은 쿠폰 (CLAIM) OR uc.used = 0 -- 받은 것 중 미사용 )

SELECT pi.product_id, f.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON pi.file_id = f.file_id WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND pi.is_thumbnail = 0 ORDER BY pi.product_id ASC, pi.sort_key ASC

SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.view_count, p.wish_count, s.seller_name, f.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_wish w WHERE w.product_id = p.product_id AND w.user_no = #{userNo} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isWished FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.product_id AND pi.is_thumbnail = 1 AND pi.sort_key = ( SELECT MIN(pi2.sort_key) FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi2 WHERE pi2.product_id = p.product_id AND pi2.is_thumbnail = 1 ) LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON f.file_id = pi.file_id WHERE p.sale_stop = 0 AND p.product_id != #{productId} AND s.seller_no = ( SELECT s2.seller_no FROM nextjs_shop_product p2 JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s2 ON s2.seller_no = p2.seller_no WHERE p2.product_id = #{productId} ) ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.wish_count) DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_seller s JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no SET s.like_count = s.like_count + 1 WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_seller_like(seller_no, user_no) VALUES((SELECT seller_no FROM nextjs_shop_product WHERE product_id = #{productId}), #{userNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE nextjs_shop_seller s JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no SET s.like_count = s.like_count - 1 WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.review_id, r.content, r.created_at AS reviewDate, r.rating, r.order_item_id, r.user_no, u.name AS userName FROM nextjs_shop_review r JOIN nextjs_shop_user u ON r.user_no = u.user_no JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON oi.hold_id = sh.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id WHERE po.product_id = #{productId} AND u.withdrawal_status = 'ACTIVE' AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY
CASE WHEN r.user_no = #{userNo} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
r.created_at DESC, r.review_id DESC

SELECT ri.review_image_id, ri.review_id, ri.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url FROM nextjs_shop_review_image ri JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON f.file_id = ri.file_id JOIN nextjs_shop_review r ON ri.review_id = r.review_id JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON oi.order_item_id = r.order_item_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON sh.hold_id = oi.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product p ON po.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.product_id = #{productId} AND f.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, ri.sort_key ASC, ri.review_image_id ASC

SELECT AVG(rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count FROM nextjs_shop_review r JOIN nextjs_shop_order_item oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN nextjs_shop_stock_hold sh ON oi.hold_id = sh.hold_id JOIN nextjs_shop_product_option po ON sh.product_option_id = po.product_option_id WHERE po.product_id = #{productId} AND r.is_deleted = 0

SELECT pq.product_qna_id, pq.question, pq.created_at, pq.answer, pq.res_created_at, pq.answer_read, pq.secret, pq.product_qna_type_id, pqt.code AS qnaTypeCode, pqt.name AS qnaTypeName, pq.product_id, pq.user_no, u.name AS userName FROM nextjs_shop_product_qna pq JOIN nextjs_shop_user u ON pq.user_no = u.user_no JOIN nextjs_shop_product_qna_type pqt ON pq.product_qna_type_id = pqt.product_qna_type_id WHERE pq.product_id = #{productId} AND u.withdrawal_status = 'ACTIVE' AND pq.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY
CASE WHEN pq.user_no = #{userNo} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC,
pq.created_at DESC, pq.product_qna_id DESC
SELECT product_qna_type_id, code, name FROM nextjs_shop_product_qna_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nextjs_shop_product_qna(question, product_qna_type_id, product_id, secret, user_no) VALUES(#{qna.question}, #{qna.productQnaTypeId}, #{productId}, #{qna.secret}, #{userNo})
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id, p.name, p.color_name, p.origin_price, p.final_price, p.created_at, p.view_count, p.wish_count, s.seller_name, f.file_id, f.file_name, f.store_name, f.file_path, f.copyright, f.copyright_url, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nextjs_shop_wish w WHERE w.product_id = p.product_id AND w.user_no = #{userNo} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isWished FROM nextjs_shop_product p JOIN nextjs_shop_seller s ON s.seller_no = p.seller_no LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_product_image pi ON pi.product_id = p.product_id AND pi.is_thumbnail = 1 AND pi.sort_key = ( SELECT MIN(pi2.sort_key) FROM nextjs_shop_product_image pi2 WHERE pi2.product_id = p.product_id AND pi2.is_thumbnail = 1 ) LEFT JOIN nextjs_shop_file f ON f.file_id = pi.file_id WHERE p.sale_stop = 0 AND p.product_id != #{productId} AND p.menu_sub_id = ( SELECT menu_sub_id FROM nextjs_shop_product WHERE product_id = #{productId} ) ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.wish_count) DESC, p.created_at DESC, p.product_id DESC LIMIT 30
